payload.actions_taken: ["reran required bootstrap and preserved its authoritative-state refusal","verified GitHub Actions run 29682593310 against exact candidate 47d3ae1a341e87cd1d76811aa7f21b4fba707fec","reproduced the Windows E0599 cfg leak with the installed x86_64-pc-windows-msvc target","moved only the pure recovery operation-root formatter outside the Unix cfg boundary","strengthened the Phase 3 verifier with an offset-preserving Rust item and block scanner","made outer-attribute discovery walk backward across comment-masked source while retaining original attribute offsets","extended function discovery across public and restricted visibility plus const async unsafe and extern qualifiers","normalized the optional Rust raw-identifier prefix when matching cfg and cfg_attr outer attributes","required each apply and recover body to contain only exact Unix dispatch and non-Unix refusal blocks","rejected executable residual text and additional ordinary or raw conditional regions outside the refusal","seeded visibility qualifier comment cfg cfg_attr unconditional Windows conditional raw and marker-preserving success adversaries","ran harness-core Windows all-targets Phase 3 Phase 6 focused provenance workflow release and documentation gates without remote mutation"]
payload.decisions_made: ["keep the deterministic relative-path formatter private and platform-neutral","keep descriptor access directory creation reads writes renames replay and mutation dispatch Unix-only","associate outer attributes through comments and complete function prefixes using masked syntax and original source offsets","treat ordinary and raw-identifier cfg and cfg_attr spellings as the same conditional attribute","require operation_root_path validate_journal_ownership apply and recover items to remain free of cfg and cfg_attr outer attributes","require apply and recover method bodies to contain exactly cfg-unix dispatch and cfg-not-unix refusal regions with only masked whitespace or comments outside them","require the actual non-Unix apply and recover bodies to consume only inert arguments and return before_journal errors unconditionally","use the affected harness-core package all-targets check as the local Windows cross-compile proof because unrelated bundled SQLite requires a Windows C SDK for workspace-wide cross-compilation","preserve Windows controlled-unsupported-before-mutation","record four successful Unix build jobs as diagnostic build evidence only because attestation execution collection and platform acceptance did not run"]
payload.errors: ["bootstrap refused because the pre-existing authoritative core state is unavailable and no database was initialized","GitHub Actions run 29682593310 failed in the Windows build before artifact upload because platform-neutral journal validation called cfg-unix OsMutationPort::operation_root","the first local Windows-target cargo check reproduced E0599 at crates/harness-core/src/recovery.rs:2631","independent review found the initial static cfg window and marker-only refusal check could produce false negatives","follow-up review found the line-based outer-attribute scan lost cfg association when legal block comments separated the attribute and helper","later review found function discovery started at fn and therefore missed cfg attributes separated by pub(crate) or inline plus pub(crate)","later review found required apply and recover method items could carry cfg or cfg_attr and disappear before their non-Unix bodies were inspected","later review found Rust raw identifiers r#cfg and r#cfg_attr bypassed conditional outer-attribute classification","latest review found unconditional cfg-windows and raw cfg-not-unix filesystem writes could execute before the validated non-Unix refusal in both methods","workspace-wide Windows all-targets cross-check reached unrelated bundled SQLite C compilation and lacked a Windows SDK stdlib.h while harness-core all-targets passed"]
payload.harness_friction: The required bootstrap cannot restore the verified core epoch because the pre-existing authoritative state is unavailable. Matrix queries and CLI-authored records remain unavailable, so this correction preserves that state and supplies an additive replayable trace without rewriting published changesets.
payload.notes: Detailed Windows compile-correction trace. The local harness-core Windows all-targets check proves compilation only; native Windows controlled-unsupported execution remains for CI. No push, dispatch, main mutation, tag, release, package, publish, production signing, platform acceptance, Phase 7 acceptance, promotion, or Phase 8 action occurred. Duration and token estimates are unavailable.
payload.task_summary: Corrected the Phase 7 Windows journal-validation cfg compile leak without enabling mutation
